title: Kidplokio 1:24 Scale Diecast 11pc Hot Rod Car Carrier Truck for Toy Race Cars
description:
Loading, unloading and hauling the 6 classic die-cast race cars within this transport truck gets imaginations moving. Playing with toy trucks and race cars as a kid is a must! No childhood is complete without a collection of toy vehicles! The Auto Hauler 6 Car Truck Carrier is brightly detailed with super speed racing flames on the side of the cab. From the side you can see all the awesome fiery of the race cars that are contained in each of their respectable slots. Additionally, the semi truck's car carrier comes with a hidden handle, so kids will be able to cart around their favorite cars to and from play dates
Deals Only Web Store
Our Store

Kidplokio 1:24 Scale Diecast 11pc Hot Rod Car Carrier Truck for Toy Race Cars

Haul them, race them and launch them, the Kidplokio 11pc Mighty Diecast Transporter Semi Truck Toy Car Carrier Set with Car Launch Action does it all! If you have kids who spend hours playing with toy cars or toy trucks, they’ll have a blast playing with the semi toy truck cargo carrier play set in either red or blue.

Youngsters will LOVE loading up diecast play cars semi toy truck carrier with the included toy cards and launching them across the room! The 11pc toy car set includes five different toy cars, a helicopter, as well as traffic signs that kids can with lots of their other toys; the pretend play possibilities are endless! No batteries or assembly required so parents, you’ve been warned, the car launching and car chases start right out of the box!

Key Features

  • TOY CAR CARRIER DIECAST VEHICLE SET: Includes five different diescast toy cars, a helicopter, as well as traffic signs that kids can use alongside lots of their other toys. The pretend play possibilities are endless. No batteries or assembly required so parents, you’ve been warned, the car launching and car chases start right out of the box!
  • 1: 24 SCALE DIECAST CARS: The semi truck diecast car carrier perfectly stores and houses all the toy cars and traffic signs when playtime wraps up, so the components never get lost. A sturdy plastic handle and snap closure, the semi toy truck cargo carrier with car launch is a great toy to pack for playdates, sleepovers or family road trips or vacations, as everything will remain safe, secure and organized
  • MULTIPLAYER TODDLER ACTIVITY: A great gift for busy kids with lots of energy! As they set up for launch and chase cars around the house, little ones will work on their fine motor skills, improving their dexterity and eye-hand coordination; in addition, kids will also develop their gross motor skills as they haul the toy semi truck cargo carrier with them and chase launched cars around the house, working on their balance and strength
  • HOUSE OF ENTERTAINMENT: This 11pc toy truck set is a great way to get kids off the couch and away from their cell phones, laptops, computers, tablets and more for some guaranteed screen-free fun times! Launching and chasing the cars, as well as playing with the set in conjunction with their other toys, will get kids using their imagination, moving, thinking, competing and having fun with (or against!) friends and family
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18" x 6.5" x 5"; Material: Plastic; Color: Red or Blue; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPSEMTRKLRED
  • UPC: 810058487407
  • Color: Red

A great gift for busy kids with lots of energy! As they set up for launch and chase cars around the house, little ones will work on their fine motor skills, improving their dexterity and eye-hand coordination; in addition, kids will also develop their gross motor skills, as they drive and haul the toy semi truck cargo carrier with them and chase launched cars around the house, working on their balance and strength. This 11pc toy truck set is also a great way to get kids off the couch and away from their cell phones, laptops, computers, tablets and more for some guaranteed screen-free fun times! Launching and chasing the cars, as well as playing with the set in conjunction with their other toys, will get kids using their imagination, moving, thinking, competing and having fun with (or against!) friends and family!

The large Mighty Transporter semi toy truck cargo carrier from Kidplokio is incredibly travel friendly, perfectly storing all the aforementioned toy cars and traffic signs when playtime wraps up, so the components never get lost! And, with a sturdy plastic handle and snap closure, the semi toy truck cargo carrier with car launch is a great toy to pack for play dates, sleepovers or family road trips or vacations, as everything will remain safe, secure and organized.

WARNING: Choking Hazard (small parts)

AGE: 3+ (edited)
